name: ASURE SOFTWARE INC
summary: Asure Software is a provider of cloud-based Human Capital Management (HCM) software delivered as SaaS to businesses of all sizes across the United States. Its core Asure HCM platform includes Payroll & Tax filing, HR management, Time & Attendance, Recruiting, and Benefits Administration. The company serves over 100,000 clients directly and through a national network of Reseller Partners who white label its solutions, with approximately 35% direct and 65% indirect clients.

products.name: Asure HCM Platform
products.description: SaaS-based system including Payroll & Tax filing, HR management, Time & Attendance, Recruiting, and Benefits Administration.

products.name: AsureMarketplace
products.description: Automates data exchange between the Asure HCM system and third-party providers for increased efficiency and accuracy.

products.name: AsurePay
products.description: Payroll card offering employees fast, secure access to earned wages, provided in association with partners.

products.name: HR Compliance Services
products.description: Combines expert guidance with scalable digital delivery to help businesses stay compliant with labor laws.

products.name: Insurance Services
products.description: Offered through a licensed brokerage to help employers manage benefits and reduce administrative costs.

partnerships.description: White label Asure products and provide value-added services to their own clients as indirect channel.
Provide client leads to Asure but do not resell Asure solutions.
